name: Infernity Destroyer
name_jp: インフェルニティ・デストロイヤー
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: Inflict 1600 damage to your opponent. You must have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: Inflict 1600 damage to your opponent. You must have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: Inflict 1600 damage to your opponent. You must have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect.

jp_sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's World Championship 2009: Stardust Accelerator Victory Road promotional card

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
